news.title:
Jefferies cuts target prices for DLF, Lodha, Oberoi, citing Middle East conflict's impact on sector growth.
DLF, Lodha, Godrej retain 'Buy' ratings; Prestige, Oberoi see cautious outlook due to pre-sales decline.
news.summary:
Jefferies cuts target prices for DLF, Lodha, Oberoi, citing Middle East conflict's impact on sector growth.
DLF, Lodha, Godrej retain 'Buy' ratings; Prestige, Oberoi see cautious outlook due to pre-sales decline.

news.title:
HDFC Securities revises target prices for real estate developers, citing slower velocity and deal closure delays.
Top picks include Prestige Estates, Godrej Properties (upgraded to Buy), Oberoi Realty, and Sobha.
news.summary:
HDFC Securities revises target prices for real estate developers, citing slower velocity and deal closure delays.
Top picks include Prestige Estates, Godrej Properties (upgraded to Buy), Oberoi Realty, and Sobha.

news.title:
Jefferies maintains Hold on Oberoi Realty, targets ₹1,680 (cut from ₹1,700).
Middle East conflict impacts Q1FY27 sales; FY27 pre-sales growth trimmed to ~6% YoY.
news.summary:
Jefferies maintains Hold on Oberoi Realty, targets ₹1,680 (cut from ₹1,700).
Middle East conflict impacts Q1FY27 sales; FY27 pre-sales growth trimmed to ~6% YoY.

news.title:
NCLT approved the merger of Nirmal Lifestyle Realty with Oberoi Realty Ltd, effective upon filing with the Registrar.
Amalgamation aims to simplify structure, enhance synergies, and improve stakeholder value for Oberoi Realty Ltd.
news.summary:
NCLT approved the merger of Nirmal Lifestyle Realty with Oberoi Realty Ltd, effective upon filing with the Registrar.
Amalgamation aims to simplify structure, enhance synergies, and improve stakeholder value for Oberoi Realty Ltd.

news.title:
Top realty players may report mixed pre-sales in Q4 FY26 due to launch delays.
Softer demand sentiment amid macro uncertainty from West Asia war impacts performance.
news.summary:
Top realty players may report mixed pre-sales in Q4 FY26 due to launch delays.
Softer demand sentiment amid macro uncertainty from West Asia war impacts performance.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty to redevelop 1,740 sqm land in Malabar Hill, Mumbai.
Company's free sale area entitlement is 51,000 sq ft RERA carpet.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty to redevelop 1,740 sqm land in Malabar Hill, Mumbai.
Company's free sale area entitlement is 51,000 sq ft RERA carpet.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty signs development agreement for 4,800 sq. m. at Peddar Road, Mumbai.
The project offers 1.4 lakh sq. ft. free sale component (RERA Carpet area).
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty signs development agreement for 4,800 sq. m. at Peddar Road, Mumbai.
The project offers 1.4 lakh sq. ft. free sale component (RERA Carpet area).

news.title:
Oberoi Realty gets NCLT extension to pay ₹919.25 crore for Hotel Horizon.
Oberoi shares closed at ₹1,446.85, up 0.1% on BSE, March 20.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty gets NCLT extension to pay ₹919.25 crore for Hotel Horizon.
Oberoi shares closed at ₹1,446.85, up 0.1% on BSE, March 20.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty approved to acquire HHPL under insolvency for Rs. 919.3 Cr.
NCLT extended payment timeline until May 7, 2026; assets possession withheld.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty approved to acquire HHPL under insolvency for Rs. 919.3 Cr.
NCLT extended payment timeline until May 7, 2026; assets possession withheld.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty-led consortium faces delays in acquiring Hotel Horizon assets under IBC due to unlawful possession by prior promoters.
NCLT grants consortium an extension until May 7, 2026, to implement the resolution plan and pay Rs. 919.3 Cr settlement.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty-led consortium faces delays in acquiring Hotel Horizon assets under IBC due to unlawful possession by prior promoters.
NCLT grants consortium an extension until May 7, 2026, to implement the resolution plan and pay Rs. 919.3 Cr settlement.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty to develop MHADA land in Mumbai, expecting 17.18 lakh sq ft free-sale area; subject to statutory approvals.
Q3FY26 results: Net profit rose 0.7% to ₹622.6 cr; revenue up 5.8%, margins narrowed to 57.4% amid higher costs.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty to develop MHADA land in Mumbai, expecting 17.18 lakh sq ft free-sale area; subject to statutory approvals.
Q3FY26 results: Net profit rose 0.7% to ₹622.6 cr; revenue up 5.8%, margins narrowed to 57.4% amid higher costs.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty signs development deal for Aram Nagar, Versova, Mumbai.
Free sale area expected at 17.18 lakh sq ft RERA carpet area, pending approvals.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty signs development deal for Aram Nagar, Versova, Mumbai.
Free sale area expected at 17.18 lakh sq ft RERA carpet area, pending approvals.

news.title:
NCLAT to hear appeal against approval of Oberoi Realty's Rs 919 crore bid.
Bench directed not to create equity for successful resolution applicants during the appeal.
news.summary:
NCLAT to hear appeal against approval of Oberoi Realty's Rs 919 crore bid.
Bench directed not to create equity for successful resolution applicants during the appeal.

news.title:
Top realty developers reported stable to healthy Q3FY26 earnings despite Labour Code compliance costs.
Companies like Prestige Estates, Lodha, Oberoi, DLF, and Godrej Properties navigated the challenges effectively.
news.summary:
Top realty developers reported stable to healthy Q3FY26 earnings despite Labour Code compliance costs.
Companies like Prestige Estates, Lodha, Oberoi, DLF, and Godrej Properties navigated the challenges effectively.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty JV partners with Aman Group for luxury Worli project.
JV I Ven Realty signs agreements for hotel, residences with Aman Group.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty JV partners with Aman Group for luxury Worli project.
JV I Ven Realty signs agreements for hotel, residences with Aman Group.

news.title:
NCLT approves Hotel Horizon's acquisition by Oberoi Realty-led consortium.
The bid offers Rs 919 crore for Rs 1,293 crore liabilities, ensuring 74% lender recovery.
news.summary:
NCLT approves Hotel Horizon's acquisition by Oberoi Realty-led consortium.
The bid offers Rs 919 crore for Rs 1,293 crore liabilities, ensuring 74% lender recovery.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty bids ₹5,400 crore to RLDA for Bandra East land development.
The bid includes initial payments and ongoing revenue-sharing agreements.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty bids ₹5,400 crore to RLDA for Bandra East land development.
The bid includes initial payments and ongoing revenue-sharing agreements.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty's ₹5,400 Cr bid is highest for 11-acre Mumbai railway land, with a 99-year lease tenure.
The land offers ~19.5 lakh sq. ft. FSI; awaiting Railway Land Development Authority's next steps.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty's ₹5,400 Cr bid is highest for 11-acre Mumbai railway land, with a 99-year lease tenure.
The land offers ~19.5 lakh sq. ft. FSI; awaiting Railway Land Development Authority's next steps.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty announces analyst/investor meets for Feb 2026 in Mumbai.
Meetings include events by Nuvama, Axis Capital, and Kotak Securities.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty announces analyst/investor meets for Feb 2026 in Mumbai.
Meetings include events by Nuvama, Axis Capital, and Kotak Securities.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty acquired 100% of Hotel Horizon Pvt Ltd via NCLT plan.
The deal involved Rs. 919.3 Cr payment for prime Mumbai land.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty acquired 100% of Hotel Horizon Pvt Ltd via NCLT plan.
The deal involved Rs. 919.3 Cr payment for prime Mumbai land.
